| AirTouch-Office | ac:8b:a9:aa:3f:d2 | 44 (5GHz) | WPA2-Enterprise | YES (2nd AP) |

1. Capture WPA2 handshake on AirTouch-Internet → crack PSK → Tablets VLAN

import struct

flags = b\"\\x01\\x00\"  # standard query

resp = s.recv(4096)
